# Veracity Technologies
> Industry-specialized managed IT services and cybersecurity for construction, financial services, manufacturing, and high-compliance organizations in Minneapolis-St. Paul, Minnesota.

## Company Overview
Veracity Technologies is a managed service provider (MSP) that delivers IT infrastructure management and cybersecurity solutions tailored to regulated, operational industries. We serve construction firms, financial services organizations, manufacturing plants, and high-compliance enterprises across the Minneapolis-St. Paul region and beyond.

Contact: (952) 941-7333 | info@veracitytech.com
Location: Minneapolis-St. Paul, MN

## Core Services

### Managed IT Services
- 24/7 proactive network monitoring with AI-powered anomaly detection
- Multi-factor authentication (MFA) deployment and management
- Disaster recovery planning (DRP) and tested backup solutions
- Industry software integration (Procore, Sage, Bloomberg, SAP, SCADA systems)
- Field and job site connectivity with ruggedized networking
- Secure remote access via VPN and zero-trust architecture
- 15-minute SLA for critical issues

### Cybersecurity Services
- Ransomware prevention and rapid incident response
- Phishing prevention and employee security training
- Credential exposure monitoring and remediation
- Payment fraud prevention with email authentication protocols
- Network segmentation and endpoint protection
- BMS/IACS and SCADA system security

### AI as a Service
- AI strategy and integration consulting
- AI security and governance frameworks
- AI-powered threat detection (ML-based SOC)
- Shadow AI monitoring and discovery
- Data loss prevention for LLMs and AI tools
- AI readiness assessments and adoption roadmaps

### Compliance Management
- CMMC (Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification)
- SOC 2 Type I and Type II
- PCI-DSS
- HIPAA
- ISO 27001
- NIST 800-171
- SEC/FINRA regulations
- OSHA digital record-keeping
- ITAR compliance

## Industries Served

### Construction
Job site connectivity, BIM security, Procore and Sage integration, rapid-response IT. Construction ransomware attacks have risen 41% year-over-year.

### Financial Services
SOC 2, PCI-DSS, and SEC/FINRA-aligned cybersecurity for banks, RIAs, and fintech. Average data breach cost in financial services: $4.9M.

### Manufacturing
OT/IT convergence security, SCADA protection, network segmentation. Manufacturing is the #1 most-attacked industry by ransomware for 3 consecutive years.

### High-Compliance Industries
CMMC, HIPAA, ITAR, NIST 800-171 expertise for defense contractors, healthcare, and government suppliers.

## Key Statistics
- 83% of organizations lack automated AI security controls (Kiteworks 2025)
- 59% of confirmed incidents are identity-driven attacks, up 156% since 2023 (eSentire 2026)
- $5.56M average cost of a data breach in financial services (IBM 2025)
- Manufacturing is #1 most-attacked industry by ransomware for 4th consecutive year, representing 29% of all victims (2025)
- Construction ransomware attacks up 24% year-over-year with 443 incidents in 2025
- Global ransomware attacks rose 32% in 2025 with average ransom payment of $2.3M
- 68% of employees use unauthorized AI tools without IT approval

## Free Offer
Veracity Technologies offers a free Technology & Cyber Risk Audit that includes:
- Full network vulnerability scan
- Password and access policy review
- Ransomware and threat readiness assessment
- Industry-specific compliance gap analysis
- Disaster recovery plan evaluation

Guarantee: If the audit does not identify at least three actionable improvements, Veracity Technologies will donate $100 to the client's chosen industry charity.

## Credentials & Affiliations
- CMMC Registered Provider
- ISO 27001 Aligned
- CompTIA Security+ Certified
- Member: AGC of America (Associated General Contractors)
- Member: ABC (Associated Builders and Contractors)

## Client Results
- 0 minutes unplanned downtime after implementation
- 60-day compliance turnaround
- 80% faster incident response
- 100% of lingering IT issues resolved

## FAQ

Q: Will a cybersecurity audit disrupt operations?
A: No. The assessment is non-invasive and uses passive scanning tools that do not interfere with networks or workflows.

Q: How long does the audit take?
A: 3-5 business days, with a comprehensive report delivered within one week.

Q: Is data kept confidential?
A: Yes. NDAs are signed before engagement, and data handling follows ISO 27001 protocols.

Q: What industries does Veracity Technologies serve?
A: Construction, financial services, manufacturing, and high-compliance industries including defense, healthcare, and government suppliers.

Q: What compliance frameworks does Veracity support?
A: CMMC, SOC 2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, ISO 27001, NIST 800-171, SEC/FINRA, OSHA, and ITAR.

Q: Does Veracity offer AI security?
A: Yes. Services include AI governance, shadow AI monitoring, data loss prevention for LLMs, AI-powered threat detection, and AI readiness assessments.
